articleTitle: Rush Out of Coconut Grove Village
introSection: Rush Out of Coconut Grove Village is a Jinma Rides catapult coaster located at Sanya Silk Road Happy World.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 Trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Rush Out of Coconut Grove Village is a Jinma Rides catapult coaster located at Sanya Silk Road Happy World.



2 Trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.
